name: mask_is_zero
reason: The L1 page address mask must be non-zero to select any physical address bits

name: mask_low_bits_set
reason: L1 pages are 1GB-aligned so bits [0,29] must be zero in the mask; non-zero low bits would corrupt page alignment

name: mask_exceeds_maxphyaddr
reason: Bits at or above MAX_PHYADDR_WIDTH must be clear; set bits there would reference non-existent physical address space

name: mask_all_ones
reason: The mask must select only the L1 page-frame bits, not every bit; equaling all-ones would be an overly broad mask

name: mask_bit30_unset
reason: Bit 30 is the lowest bit of a 1GB-aligned page frame address and must be included in the mask; its absence would lose address information
